creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192701
py-djangocms-admin-style.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch (svn) for the Python package www/py-djangocms-admin-style that provides CSS styles for the Django CMS admin interface.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK

Note:
- This package is intended as preparation for an update of www/py-django-cms which will require the port then.
